variants.title: Mann Filter LE 6012 Compressed Air-Oil Separation | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55150
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter LE 6012 Compressed Air-Oil Separation | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55150
variants.description: MANN-FILTER air deoiling elements reliably separate oil from the compressed air in compressors and vacuum pumps. This is how they ensure clean air, prolong the service life of the equipment and provide optimum performance. High-quality media for air deoiling elements from the technology leader MANN-FILTER ensure a high separation rate and a low residual oil content. This minimizes oil loss and leads to low energy and oil consumption over the entire service life.
specifications: Style: Compressed Air-Oil Separation, Dimension A: 70.0 mm, Dimension B: 41.0 mm, Dimension H: 250.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P785227 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55150
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P785227 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55150
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P785227 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OA 3407 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55150
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OA 3407 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55150
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OA 3407 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO55150. Easy to install and replace, the OA 3407 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
